LanguageData.MGAutoSell.RuleInvalid: This rule is invalid because the minimum exceeds the maximum.
LanguageData.MGAutoSell.Title: Find / Trade
LanguageData.MGAutoSell.InvalidRange: This rule is invalid because you are trying to have at least {0}, and at most {1}.\nImport must be larger than Export.
LanguageData.MGAutoSell.InvalidBuy: This rule is invalid because you are trying to import {0}.
LanguageData.MGAutoSell.Basically: This Maintain rule is basically an {0} rule, since your {1} amount is not greater than 0.
LanguageData.MGAutoSell.Settings.BenchmarkDisabled: Load a save/map to enable benchmarking.
LanguageData.MGAutoSell.Settings.scanEveryStackToolti: When enabled, the system will scan every stack of items instead of just the first per ThingDef.
LanguageData.MGAutoSell.Settings.showAllMatchingItems: When enabled, the system will display all items that match the trade rules, not just selling.
